chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4669 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to maintainability of petition. 04.03.2025 Petitioner, Ms. Mehwish Hameed, is present in person. Petition remains listed for orders as to maintainability since inception. Prayer clause reads as follows: “It is therefore humbly prayed to this Honorable Court that direction be passed to the Chairman BASR, Vice Chancellor to award and ensure my degree of PH.D on priority basis and on earliest basis as I got selected Assistant Professor in 2010 by the HEC on successful defense of thesis by foreign professors and HEC required my Degree of PH.D for the placement at University under Interim Placement Fresh Ph.D program and age limit for placement at University under IPFP is 45 years. After 45 years my selection letter of Assistant Professor shall be expired by HEC. After being over age I will be deprived of getting job of HEE. May be pleased to save me from being unemployed and from economic as well as academic loss.” Prima facie, this matter is fraught with factual controversy which could not be adjudicated in writ jurisdiction. Petitioner in person also remains unable to substantiate as to how writ could be issued to the respondent within meaning of Article 199 of the Constitution. In view of foregoing, petition is found to be mis-conceived, hence dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
